field_of_view_deg: 85 horizontal / 44.8 vertical / 98.1 diagonal (before lens correction); 72 horizontal / 42.9 vertical / 80.4 diagonal (after lens correction)

power.method: 802.3af PoE or 24V Passive PoE; 4W standalone, 9W with optional IR Range Extender

features: official datasheet has no Weatherproofing/IP-rating row for this specific model -- only marketing text "Outdoor Weather Resistant" -- ip_rating left unconfirmed, do not assume IP67 (that's the sibling G3 Pro's confirmed rating)

no baseline IR range figure given in the official datasheet -- only the optional IR Range Extender accessory's rated distance (up to 25m) is documented, which is not the same as the camera's own built-in IR range
optional IR Range Extender accessory (UVC-G3-LED) compatible with this model only, adds 6 high-intensity IR LEDs
legacy/vintage product (2018-era UniFi Video/Protect G3 generation)

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
